requirement_topic.en: Peru market entry and import clearance (Reglamento Tecnico, SUNAT, importer of record)
requirement_topic.zh: 秘鲁市场进入与进口放行（技术规章、SUNAT、进口商）
requirement_topic.zht: 秘魯市場進入與進口放行（技術規章、SUNAT、進口商）

summary.en: Household refrigerators must be introduced to Peru through an importer of record established in Peru. When a category is subject to a Reglamento Tecnico, Peru import clearance at SUNAT relies on the conformity evidence package prepared by the importer and reviewed by INDECOPI/PRODUCE-related control channels. Port-of-entry practice commonly uses Callao for sea freight. The importer is the responsible local party for customs and post-clearance obligations.
summary.zh: 家用冰箱须通过秘鲁境内设立的进口商主体进行进口。若该类目受技术规章覆盖，秘鲁海关（SUNAT）清关依赖进口商提交的符合性文件包，并通过INDECOPI/PRODUCE相关审核通道。海运常见口岸为卡亚俄港。进口商为海关及后续市场责任主体。
summary.zht: 家用冰箱須透過秘魯境內設立的進口商主體進行進口。若該類目受技術規章覆蓋，秘魯海關（SUNAT）清關依賴進口商提交的符合性文件包，並透過INDECOPI/PRODUCE相關審核通道。海運常見港口為卡亞俄港。進口商為海關及後續市場責任主體。

standards_or_laws: PRODUCE / INDECOPI technical regime and applicable Reglamento Tecnico framework
SUNAT import and customs clearance requirements
Port of Callao operational clearance practice for household appliances

summary.en: China uses CCC documentation for domestic sale, import and importer-of-record responsibilities in Peru are not mirrored as a direct export clearance mechanism. Chinese certificates are evidence for Chinese market compliance and do not replace a Peru importer-led customs packet.
summary.zh: 中国体系下CCC文档用于中国境内合规，且并未形成与秘鲁进口商主导清关机制直接对应的出口通道。中国证书仅支持中国市场合规，不能替代秘鲁进口商主导的通关文件包。
summary.zht: 中國體系下CCC文件用於中國境內合規，且並未形成與秘魯進口商主導清關機制直接對應的出口通道。中國證書僅支援中國市場合規，不能替代秘魯進口商主導的通關文件包。

standards_or_laws: CCC documentation issued by CNCA/SAMR for domestic China placement
No direct Peru-recognition mechanism for CCC under Peru customs and technical regime

gap.en: Exporter-facing gap is structural: no CCC reciprocity and no self-clearance model in Peru. The importer must hold local registration and submit the Peru-specific packet per shipment and per product class.
gap.zh: 对出口商而言的差距是制度性差距：CCC无互认且秘鲁不允许出口商自行清关。进出口必须由当地进口商持有当地资质、按货物和产品类别提交秘鲁特定材料。
gap.zht: 對出口商而言的差距是制度性差距：CCC無互認且秘魯不允許出口商自行清關。進出口必須由當地進口商持有當地資質、按貨物和產品類別提交秘魯特定材料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Peru placement where a Reglamento Tecnico applies and for customs release at SUNAT (Callao is a common entry point)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic compliance via CCC; not recognized as a Peru customs substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru clearance for refrigerators is importer-led: work with a Peru-established importer, confirm applicable Reglamento Tecnico scope, and submit a conformity package for Callao customs. Chinese certificates support Chinese sales only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁冰箱放行为进口商主导：需与秘鲁本地进口商合作，确认适用技术规章范围，并为卡亚俄港通关提交合规文件包。中国证书仅支持中国销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯冰箱放行為進口商主導：需與秘魯本地進口商合作，確認適用技術規章範圍，並為卡亞俄港通關提交合規文件包。中國證書僅支持中國銷售。

requirement_topic.en: 220 V 60 Hz product adaptation and market labels (Peru vs China)
requirement_topic.zh: 220 V 60 Hz适配与市场标签（秘鲁与中国）
requirement_topic.zht: 220 V 60 Hz適配與市場標籤（秘魯與中國）

summary.en: Peru’s electrical supply context for household refrigerators is 220 V and 60 Hz. Imported products should confirm rating plate data, compressor and control settings, and instruction/manual content for this context. Spanish labeling is required where consumer laws apply.
summary.zh: 秘鲁家用冰箱场景以220 V、60 Hz为基础，因此进口产品应确认铭牌参数、压缩机与控制参数与该工况一致，并补充西班牙语说明书内容。消费者法要求下需使用西班牙语标签。
summary.zht: 秘魯家用冰箱場景以220 V、60 Hz為基礎，故進口產品應確認銘牌參數、壓縮機與控制參數與該工況一致，並補充西班牙語說明書內容。消費者法要求下需使用西班牙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: INDECOPI labeling and consumer information obligations (Spanish content requirements)
Peru import documentation requirements for technical adaptation
Reglamento Tecnico verification in relation to voltage-frequency operation

summary.en: China testing for refrigerators is commonly based on 220/380 V and 50 Hz operating conditions in national certification workflows. China labeling can follow Chinese language rules and domestic naming; this does not satisfy Peru-specific labeling or voltage-frequency confirmation requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内认证流程通常基于220/380 V、50 Hz运行条件，且标签语言按中国规则。该条件并不满足秘鲁对220V 60Hz工况和西班牙语标签的要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內認證流程通常基於220/380 V、50 Hz運行條件，且標籤語言按中國規則。該條件並不滿足秘魯對220V 60Hz工況和西班牙語標籤的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 and related Chinese electrical test basis
Chinese electrical supply and naming standards for domestic compliance

gap.en: This is a practical engineering gap: not all China-tested models are immediately aligned to 220 V 60 Hz operation. Per exporter records, a model should be verified for field adaptation and updated manuals before market placement.
gap.zh: 这是实际工程层面的差距：并非所有中国检测过的型号可直接对应220V 60Hz运行。出口商需先核实并确认型号适配后再进入市场，并更新说明书。
gap.zht: 這是實際工程層面的差距：並非所有中國檢測過的型號可直接對應220V 60Hz運行。出口商需先核實並確認型號適配後再進入市場，並更新說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory operational requirement for marketable models and importer labeling responsibilities in Peru
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestic testing in Chinese conditions is separate and cannot replace Peru-specific operation/context verification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Before release in Peru, verify Spanish labeling, voltage-frequency compatibility, and importer-led documentation alignment. 220 V 60 Hz operation is a material expectation even when China tests were done at 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在秘鲁投放前，需核实西班牙语标签、220V 60Hz适配性、以及进口商主导文件衔接。即使中国按50Hz测试，220V 60Hz运行依然是实质性要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在秘魯投放前，需核實西班牙語標籤、220V 60Hz適配性，以及進口商主導文件銜接。即使中國按50Hz測試，220V 60Hz運行依然是實質性要求。
